# LOVELACE Icon - AI Image Generation Prompt

## For Midjourney, DALL-E 3, or Adobe Firefly

---

### Concept Summary

LOVELACE is an Ada language IDE, named for Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace — the world's first computer programmer. She wrote Note G in 1843, an algorithm for Babbage's Analytical Engine now recognised as the first computer program. The icon shows a **Victorian algorithmic manuscript** — an aged parchment document styled like one of Ada's actual annotated notes — containing real Ada programming language syntax written as if in her hand, including the Bernoulli number computation. An ornate Victorian border frames the page. A **crimson wax seal** bearing a glowing italic **L** sits at the bottom right, as if the Countess herself authenticated the document. Color palette is Victorian sepia and gold — aged parchment, brown ink, candlelit gold.

---

### Primary Prompt

A square app icon on a very dark near-black warm background with subtle candlelight amber glow from above. The icon depicts an **aged Victorian parchment manuscript document** filling most of the frame — slightly yellowed, unevenly toned, with aged stain marks suggesting great age. An ornate Victorian double-line border with decorative corner flourishes frames the page. At the top, a gold-ink header reads "NOTE G" in elegant italic, with subtitle "On the Analytical Engine's Capacity" and attribution "A.A. King, Countess of Lovelace — 1843". The manuscript body mixes handwritten-style italic prose with Ada programming language syntax in a monospace hand: a `procedure Bernoulli` with array declarations, `begin`/`end loop` constructs, a `pragma Assert` statement. Small marginal annotations in italic — "var. I", "iter.", "† vide the diagram" — appear in the margins alongside a small operations table with mathematical symbols B₀ B₂. Decorative gold rules with star ornaments ✦ divide sections. At the bottom-right, a **crimson wax seal** — red wax, slightly irregular, pressed — bears the circular text "· LOVELACE ·" around its rim and a large glowing italic capital **L** in warm white at its center. A small ribbon trails beneath the seal. The overall palette is Victorian sepia and gold — warm parchment yellows, brown ink, gold decorations, deep crimson seal — on a dark candlelit background. Cinematic, high contrast, professional app icon, 1:1 square format.

---

### Midjourney Specific Version

```
Square app icon, very dark warm background candlelight glow, aged Victorian parchment manuscript document filling frame, yellowed uneven parchment with age stains, ornate Victorian double border with corner flourishes, gold italic header NOTE G subtitle On the Analytical Engine attribution A.A. King Countess of Lovelace 1843, manuscript body mixing handwritten italic prose with Ada programming syntax procedure Bernoulli begin end loop pragma Assert, marginal annotations italic small operations table, gold decorative rules with star ornaments, crimson wax seal bottom-right with LOVELACE rim text and glowing italic white L center with ribbon beneath, Victorian sepia gold palette warm parchment brown ink crimson seal, cinematic high contrast professional app icon --style raw --stylize 750 --ar 1:1 --v 6
```

---

### DALL-E 3 Specific Version

```
Create a professional square app icon on a very dark warm near-black background with subtle candlelight atmosphere. Design an aged Victorian parchment manuscript document filling most of the frame. The parchment should look genuinely old — uneven yellowing, subtle age stains, slightly warm in tone. An ornate Victorian double-line border with decorative corner flourishes frames the page. The manuscript has: a gold-ink italic header "NOTE G" with subtitle text and "A.A. King, Countess of Lovelace — 1843"; body text mixing handwritten italic serif prose with monospace Ada programming syntax (procedure Bernoulli, array declarations, begin/end loop, pragma Assert); small italic marginal annotations and a tiny operations table with B₀ B₂ symbols; decorative horizontal rules with ✦ ornaments dividing sections. At the bottom-right, a crimson wax seal with slightly irregular pressed-wax texture bears "· LOVELACE ·" around its circular rim and a large glowing italic capital "L" in warm white at center, with a small ribbon beneath. Victorian sepia and gold throughout — warm parchment, brown ink, gold decorations, crimson seal. Cinematic, high contrast, professional icon.
```

```
App icon: aged Victorian parchment manuscript document, warm yellowed parchment with ornate double border corner flourishes, gold italic NOTE G header with Countess of Lovelace attribution 1843, body mixing handwritten italic prose and Ada programming syntax procedure Bernoulli begin end loop pragma Assert, marginal annotations small operations table, gold decorative rules with star ornaments, crimson wax seal bottom-right with LOVELACE rim and glowing italic white L. Victorian sepia gold palette on dark candlelit background. Professional 1:1 square icon.
```

---

### Tips for Best Results

- Upload the FABLE icon as a partial palette reference — both are warm document-on-dark-background icons, though LOVELACE is parchment not leather
- If the parchment looks too white/clean: *"the parchment must look genuinely aged — uneven yellowing, warm amber tones, subtle foxing marks, not pristine white paper"*
- If the Ada syntax isn't visible: *"the programming code should be clearly legible in a monospace style, as if written carefully in a fine ink hand"*
- The wax seal is the hero detail — if it looks flat: *"the wax seal should look three-dimensional with visible press texture and slight irregularity at the edges, deep crimson"*
- If the L on the seal is too small: *"the L should be large enough to read at thumbnail size, the brightest element on the seal"*
- For maximum period authenticity: *"the style should feel like a genuine document from the 1840s — think Dickensian London, candlelit writing desk, quill and ink"*

---

### Color Reference

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| Background | #0f0b03 (near-black warm) |
| Parchment body | #d4c080 / #e8d8a0 (aged yellows) |
| Parchment shadows | #b09040 (deeper amber) |
| Prose/annotations | #3a2808 (dark brown ink) |
| Ada syntax text | #2a1a04 (very dark ink) |
| Gold header/rules | #c8960a / #a07808 (warm gold) |
| Border/flourishes | #8a6820 (aged gold) |
| Operations table | #5a3a08 (mid brown) |
| Wax seal body | #8a1a10 / #cc3322 (deep crimson) |
| Seal rim text | #e8a080 (warm pink-gold) |
| L letter | #ffffff warm white |
| L halo | #ffe0c0 (warm cream) |
| Candlelight | #ff9922 subtle |
